# Hyperbrowser — Cloud Browser Platform for AI Agents

For the complete self-contained reference (setup + all examples + API reference + gotchas in one file):
https://docs.hyperbrowser.ai/.well-known/skills/hyperbrowser/SKILL.md

## Quick Start

```bash
npm install @hyperbrowser/sdk
export HYPERBROWSER_API_KEY=your-key    # get at app.hyperbrowser.ai
```

```typescript
import Hyperbrowser from "@hyperbrowser/sdk";

const client = new Hyperbrowser({ apiKey: process.env.HYPERBROWSER_API_KEY });

const result = await client.scrape.startAndWait({
  url: "https://news.ycombinator.com",
});
console.log(result.data);
```

## API Methods

- `client.scrape.startAndWait({ url, formats?, onlyMainContent?, timeout? })` → scrape a page
- `client.extract.startAndWait({ urls, schema, prompt? })` → structured data extraction
- `client.sessions.create(options?)` → manual browser session
  - options: `useStealth`, `useProxy`, `proxyCountry`, `solveCaptchas`, `acceptCookies`
  - returns: `{ id, wsEndpoint }`
- `client.sessions.stop(sessionId)` → REQUIRED cleanup (call in finally block)
- `client.agents.browserUse.startAndWait({ task })` → autonomous browser agent

## Manual Session Pattern

```typescript
import { chromium } from "playwright-core";

const session = await client.sessions.create();
try {
  const browser = await chromium.connectOverCDP(session.wsEndpoint);
  const page = browser.contexts()[0].pages()[0];
  await page.goto("https://example.com");
} finally {
  await client.sessions.stop(session.id);  // REQUIRED
}
```

## Key Gotchas

- Package: `@hyperbrowser/sdk` (Node.js) / `hyperbrowser` (Python) — DIFFERENT names
- Env var: `HYPERBROWSER_API_KEY`
- CDP endpoint field: `session.wsEndpoint` (not `session.url` or `session.cdp_ws_url`)
- Always `sessions.stop()` in finally block — leaked sessions consume cloud resources
- Prefer `scrape.startAndWait()` over manual sessions for simple tasks
- Dashboard: app.hyperbrowser.ai (not hyperbrowser.ai — that's marketing)

## Doc Pages

- /docs/quickstart — install, auth, first scrape
- /docs/sessions — manual Playwright sessions over CDP
- /docs/scraping — scrape + extract + browser agent
- /docs/api-reference — full SDK reference
- /docs/troubleshooting — error catalog
